svg.title: System architecture — Chatbot for College Information System
svg.desc: Five-layer system architecture: clients, presentation, backend with NLP engine, data layer, and scraper

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the student browser interact with the chatbot?')
sendPrompt('What can the admin do in the admin browser panel?')
sendPrompt('What frontend features does index.html have in the chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How does admin.html authenticate and allow response editing?')
sendPrompt('What are all the Flask API endpoints in app.py?')
sendPrompt('How does TF-IDF vectorization turn text into features?')
sendPrompt('How does Logistic Regression OvR do multi-label intent classification?')
sendPrompt('How is model.pkl loaded for fast prediction without retraining?')
sendPrompt('What CRUD operations does database.py handle?')
sendPrompt('What are the 3 tables in university.db?')
sendPrompt('How does data.json serve as a fallback when scraping is blocked?')
sendPrompt('How does scraper.py use BeautifulSoup and session cookies?')
sendPrompt('Why does cuchd.in return 403 and how is it handled gracefully?')
